_note: Archive of blogs. Entries with source 'existing-pre-workflow' were already live on labelwala.store before this workflow existed — cataloged 2026-06-19 from search-indexed content (site blocks direct fetch, so seo_score/word_count are AUDIT ESTIMATES, not workflow-generated). Entries with source 'workflow' are produced by blog-orchestrator Phase 7.

blogs.title: Label Size Guide: Standard Dimensions for Every Type of Clothing Label
blogs.meta_title: Label Size Guide: Standard Dimensions for Every Type of Clothing Label
blogs.meta_description: Standard sizes for neck labels, care labels, size tabs, hem tags, woven/printed patches, ribbons, name tapes and school crests — in mm, calibrated for Indian garment tolerances.
blogs.audit_note: Strongest existing post. Specific mm dimensions with practical reasoning (e.g. sub-12x18mm hard to grip during stitching). This is the quality bar for new posts. Clean URL under /blog/.

blogs.title: Printed Fabric Label At Best Price In India
blogs.meta_title: Printed Fabric Label At Best Price In India
blogs.meta_description: India-first guide to printed fabric labels: materials, print methods, sizes, compliance, pricing, MOQs and artwork setup to get the best price without losing durability.
topics_covered: printed label materials (satin, cotton, polyester, blends)
blogs.audit_note: Thorough content but title 'At Best Price In India' is a keyword-forced/dated pattern (humanizer would rewrite). URL is root-level, NOT under /blog/ — inconsistent structure. Recommend 301 to /blog/ and a more natural title.

blogs.title: Stop Losing Clothes In Hostel Laundry With Name Labels
blogs.meta_title: Stop Losing Clothes In Hostel Laundry With Name Labels
blogs.meta_description: How many name labels a hostel student needs (40-60), which label types last 100+ washes, and where to place them on uniforms, towels and bedding.
topics_covered: label placement (collars, waistbands, side seams, fabric corners)
blogs.audit_note: Problem-led title (good, human voice). Pairs with /student-number-label-sgvp/ and /name-number-labels product pages. Root-level URL — same /blog/ consistency note as blog 2.
